title: Plans
subtitle: Manage Chargebee billing plans — create, edit prices and limits, and control pricing page visibility

visibility.enterpriseAlwaysHidden: Enterprise is always assigned by an admin and never listed publicly

empty.title: No plans found
empty.subtitle: Create your first plan to get started.

error.checkConnection: Please check your connection and try again.

form.idHint: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens. Cannot be changed later.
form.name: Name
form.visibleHint: New plans start hidden so you can finish setting them up before customers see them.
form.pricesHint: Amounts are per billing period in major units (e.g. 6 = $6.00). Currency and period are fixed once created — a Chargebee restriction.
form.backfillWarning: Saving new limits immediately updates every organization on this plan ({{count}} currently subscribed).

confirm.archiveBody: Archive "{{name}}"? It disappears from the pricing page and can no longer be assigned, but existing subscriptions keep renewing on it.
confirm.restoreBody: Restore "{{name}}"? It becomes assignable again (pricing page visibility is controlled separately).

toasts.createdDetail: The plan has been created in Chargebee.
toasts.archivedDetail: The plan can no longer be assigned or purchased.
toasts.visibilityOn: Plan is now visible on the pricing page
toasts.visibilityOff: Plan is now hidden from the pricing page
